questions.question: In the shopping cart Pinia store, what does the totalPrice getter compute?
options: The number of unique products in the cart
The sum of price × qty for all items
The average price of all items
The price after applying a discount code

questions.question: What happens when updateQty() is called with qty <= 0 in the cart store?
options: The qty is set to 0 and the item remains in the cart
The item is removed from the cart by calling removeItem()
The qty is reset to 1 as the minimum

questions.question: Which method is recommended for persisting the cart state across page refreshes?
options: Using a computed property that reads from localStorage
Calling $subscribe on the store and writing to localStorage on each mutation
Saving state in a cookie on every action
